input.question: Show the number of students in each department

payload.question: Show the number of students in each department

output.sql:
SELECT COALESCE(d.name, s.department) AS department_name, COUNT(*) AS student_count
FROM students s
LEFT JOIN departments d ON d.id = s.department_id
GROUP BY COALESCE(d.name, s.department)
ORDER BY student_count DESC;

payload.sql:
SELECT COALESCE(d.name, s.department) AS department_name, COUNT(*) AS student_count
FROM students s
LEFT JOIN departments d ON d.id = s.department_id
GROUP BY COALESCE(d.name, s.department)
ORDER BY student_count DESC;
